Code fragment: public final TableField<RemoteFilesRecord, UUID> ID = createField(DSL.name("id"), SQLDataType.UUID.defaultValue(DSL.field("gen_random_uuid()", SQLDataType.UUID)), this, "");
Explanation: The primary key column is named just 'id', which is a generic name that doesn't convey any meaning about the entity it identifies. Consider renaming it to 'remote_file_id' or similar to make it more descriptive and avoid ambiguity in queries with joins.

Using selectFrom() fetches all columns from the REMOTE_FILES table, which retrieves unnecessary data and reduces query performance. Instead, explicitly select only the required columns using .select(remoteFilesTable.ID, remoteFilesTable.PATH, ...).from(remoteFilesTable).
